description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named lint-and-test that runs on push to main and on pull requests to main. Run four ubuntu-latest jobs in parallel: lint-docs, lint-style, lint-typing, and test. The test job runs a matrix of Python versions 3.8 through 3.12. Each job checks out the repository, sets up the respective Python version, installs hatch, and then performs specific linting or testing tasks.
